title: Manufacturing Engineer - Charak Pharma - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Charak Pharma - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Charak Pharma has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Charak Pharma:
Charak Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Charak Pharma!
